description_long: This object depicts a school complex set within a rectangular grassy plot, featuring several interconnected buildings with red-tiled gable roofs and beige walls. The main school buildings are arranged in a U-shape, enclosing a central courtyard, and are connected by paved walkways. Adjacent to the main complex, there are four smaller, detached rectangular structures, likely representing auxiliary buildings or garages, aligned parallel to a main road that runs along one edge of the property. The grounds include a large open grassy area, possibly for sports or recreation, outlined by a faint path. The overall layout is organized and functional, with clear separation between the main educational facilities and supporting structures. The setting suggests a suburban or semi-rural environment, with ample green space surrounding the school.
description: A school complex with red-tiled roofs, beige walls, and a central courtyard, surrounded by green grounds and several auxiliary buildings along a main road.
description_view_0: The main school buildings and courtyard are prominent, with the auxiliary structures and road visible in the foreground.
description_view_1: The view highlights the road running alongside the school and the alignment of the auxiliary buildings, with the main complex set further back.
description_view_2: The school complex is seen from the opposite side, showing the full length of the main buildings and the open grassy area to the right.
description_view_3: The auxiliary buildings are in the foreground, with the main school complex and courtyard visible further back, and the large grassy area to the left.
